fields.label: Does this Supplier present a conflict of interest?
Will employees or representatives of the supplier perform work at an Otis site (Factory, office, warehouse, etc.)(It does not matter if the Otis site is owned, leased, rented, etc.)?
If yes, will the employee or representatives of the supplier perform physical work?  (Some examples of physical work include:  climbing a ladder, installing equipment, hoisting, lifting, etc.)
Is Otis Importer of Record (handling customs documentation)
Is supplier C-TPAT certified, or a member of an equivalent country cargo security program (ex. PIP, AEO)?
Will this be a one-time activity (job specific)?
DO YOU ALREADY HAVE A VENDOR WHICH PROVIDES THIS SAME SERVICE / PRODUCT?
